info.title: Marvel Comics API
info.description: The Marvel Comics API allows developers to access information about Marvel's vast library of comics, characters, stories, events, creators, and series. Authentication requires a public API key and for server-side applications, an MD5 hash of a timestamp, private key, and public key.

get.description: Fetches lists of comic characters with optional filters.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Return only characters matching the specified full character name

parameters.name: nameStartsWith
parameters.description: Return characters with names that begin with the specified string

parameters.name: modifiedSince
parameters.description: Return only characters which have been modified since the specified date

parameters.name: comics
parameters.description: Return only characters which appear in the specified comics (comma-separated list of IDs)

parameters.name: series
parameters.description: Return only characters which appear in the specified series (comma-separated list of IDs)

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: Return only characters which appear in the specified events (comma-separated list of IDs)

parameters.name: stories
parameters.description: Return only characters which appear in the specified stories (comma-separated list of IDs)

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Order the result set by a field or fields

get.description: Fetches a single character by ID.
Fetches lists of comics containing a specific character.

parameters.name: dateRange
parameters.description: Return comics within a predefined date range (comma-separated dates)

get.description: Fetches lists of events in which a specific character appears.
Fetches lists of comic series in which a specific character appears.
Fetches lists of comic stories featuring a specific character.
Fetches lists of comics with optional filters.
Fetches lists of comic creators with optional filters.
Fetches lists of events with optional filters.
Fetches lists of comic series with optional filters.
Fetches lists of comic stories with optional filters.

timestamp.name: ts
timestamp.description: A timestamp (or other long string which can change on a request-by-request basis)

hash.name: hash
hash.description: MD5 digest of the ts parameter, your private key, and your public key (ts+privateKey+publicKey)

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Limit the result set to the specified number of resources

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Skip the specified number of resources in the result set

Unauthorized.description: Invalid or missing API key / hash / timestamp

path.description: The directory path to the image
